description: Removed deprecated `get_several` and `get_top_tracks` operations from the Artists service to match [Spotify's February 2026 Web API removals](https://developer.spotify.com/documentation/web-api/references/changes/february-2026), which removed `GET /artists` and `GET /artists/{id}/top-tracks`. ([#71](https://github.com/jonathan343/spotify-sdk/pull/71))
